name: GPU render diff
input: A candidate image has lower diff but missing labels.
expected_behavior: Uses target requirements and crops; does not accept based on score alone.

name: Quantum circuit diagram
input: A circuit render may have swapped measurement labels.
expected_behavior: Inspects labels/order against circuit semantics and records evidence.

name: Ambiguous plot
input: A plot style choice is subjective and target is unclear.
expected_behavior: Asks user to choose with artifact context rather than guessing silently.
